evidence.label: Remaining evidence
evidence.summary: 3 hardware gate and 1 lifecycle gate remain; known gaps stay explicit.

hardware.label: Hardware qualification
hardware.summary: 2 receiver routes have bounded physical evidence; 10 candidates remain research only.

publication.label: Unreleased
publication.summary: Public source is available for review; no supported product release or package channel exists.

repository.label: Repository map
repository.summary: The Repository Atlas owns 32 subsystem records and their generated projections.

software.label: Software verification
software.summary: 5 of 10 release gates are ready in software.
